mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate trend, even from a low base, signals the onset of monetary tightening that raises discount rates on future equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as markets price in less accommodative policy.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rising FEDFUNDS periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month window from a cyclical low, it signals an inflection toward labor market deterioration that historically precedes broader economic slowdown, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in more than 55% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth combined with a rising federal funds rate creates a tension between resilient consumer demand and tightening financial conditions; when both occur jointly, equity markets reprice growth expectations downward faster than when either signal appears alone, producing negative 20-day forward returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month annualized growth > 5% AND FEDFUNDS rising
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with strong consumer demand
failure_condition: Joint-trigger sample shows 20d returns statistically indistinguishable from single-signal (RSAFS-only or FEDFUNDS-only) samples, or Rank IC gain from interaction term < 0.02 versus additive baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained industrial production growth above its trailing 12-month average during a late-cycle expansion signals capacity utilization pressures that later translate into margin compression and inflation risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as markets anticipate policy tightening.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns following above-trend INDPRO growth are not significantly lower than baseline (p > 0.05) over a 5-year rolling sample, or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When headline CPI year-over-year growth exceeds 6%, indicating inflation running well above the Federal Reserve's implicit tolerance, equity markets react with heightened short-term volatility and negative drift as investors price accelerated rate-hike expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL value 239.927 implies elevated YoY inflation near multi-decade highs as of snapshot date
failure_condition: 5d forward returns following CPI>6% YoY prints are not significantly negative (p > 0.05) across triggered instances, or hit rate of negative return sign falls below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Continued positive month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects ongoing labor market strength that supports consumer income and corporate earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns following positive PAYEMS prints show Rank IC below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts exceeding 10% over a 3-month period signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand that historically leads broader consumption pullbacks, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns following triggered HOUST declines are not significantly negative (p > 0.05), or SPX shows positive returns in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is rising while the unemployment rate simultaneously trends upward, it signals a policy error regime where tightening occurs into labor market weakness rather than strength, historically preceding recessions and producing pronounced negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days, stronger than either signal alone.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rising AND UNRATE rising over trailing 3 months
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle coinciding with labor market deterioration
failure_condition: Joint-trigger sample 60d returns are not significantly more negative than the FEDFUNDS-only trigger sample (p > 0.05), or Rank IC improvement from interaction term is below 0.02.
